notableMoments: Qualified for their first and only World Cup in 2006 by defeating Bahrain in the intercontinental playoff
Dennis Lawrence headed the decisive goal against Bahrain that sent the twin-island nation to the World Cup
Held Sweden to a 0-0 draw in their opening World Cup match in Dortmund
Squad featured veteran stars Dwight Yorke and Shaka Hislop in their final international tournaments
The smallest nation (by population) to qualify for a World Cup at the time with 1.3 million people
Entire nation celebrated qualification as the greatest sporting achievement in the country's history
